things.name: The Las Vegas Strip
things.description: 4.2-mile boulevard of the world's most spectacular hotels — free street entertainment from the Bellagio fountains to the Venetian

things.name: Bellagio Fountains & Conservatory
things.description: Free water ballet choreographed to music every 15-30 minutes — the conservatory changes display seasonally

things.name: Grand Canyon South Rim Day Trip
things.description: One of the Seven Natural Wonders — helicopter or coach trip to the most visited viewpoints of the Colorado River

things.name: High Roller Observation Wheel
things.description: The world's tallest observation wheel at 167 m — 30-minute revolution with open bar cabins at night

things.name: Cirque du Soleil O
things.description: The aquatic Cirque masterpiece performed in and above a 1.5-million-gallon pool at the Bellagio

things.name: Fremont Street Experience
things.description: Downtown Las Vegas covered pedestrian mall with a 1,500-ft LED ceiling canopy and free live concerts

things.name: Hoover Dam
things.description: One of the world's engineering marvels — 726-foot dam tours with views of Lake Mead, 50 km from the Strip

things.name: Zion National Park
things.description: Red rock canyon hiking 2.5 hours north — Angels Landing and The Narrows slot canyon are world-class

things.name: Vegas Indoor Skydiving (iFLY)
things.description: Experience freefall in a vertical wind tunnel — no experience needed for the 2-minute flight

things.name: Buffet at The Cosmopolitan
things.description: The Wicked Spoon Buffet — Las Vegas finest, with live cooking stations, lobster and dessert theatre
